---
name: New compiler target
about: Propose or start a compiler for a new stack
labels: new-target
---

## Target stack

<!-- e.g. Go/Gin, Rust/Axum, Kotlin/Spring -->

## Who's building it

- [ ] I want to build it (we'll actively support you)
- [ ] I'm proposing it for someone to pick up

## Notes

<!-- Ecosystem specifics worth discussing before starting: ORM choice, test framework, anything that might strain the spec's target neutrality -->

Reminder: new targets implement the existing spec — no RFC needed. If you hit something the spec can't express for your target, that's an `expressiveness` issue (and possibly a future RFC).
